blended.narrative: Gunstock Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: light rain showers, highs of 55°F.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 58°F.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
